{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321231424E65D9AA3B12E1CCA3C27"}"},"total":884},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7377257588674904856","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书太好看啦！是我看过的最好之一！带“校花”周影升级！“校花”周影升级！周影升级！升级！[笑哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717653600,"group_id":"7368494408586513432","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"最近书荒，试着自娱自乐！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N373Fi31ej2Lw/cepDJ64wGZBfV3N+RY+ZOE0kxvHfdM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7cc2d0118d444a6aaa23e453fd43cca4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616379&x-signature=WZC9%2BieCLi2pCv5vzeYHE8DIAy8%3D","user_id":"2008138583653659","user_name":"楊老汉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2008138583653659","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7368494408586513432","book_info":{"abstract":"灾厄入侵，全球迷雾、深渊、虫洞副本接连出现。
魔物肆掠，危机与宝物并存。
唯有成为异兽师，召唤强大异兽，方可抗衡。
樱花国召唤八岐大蛇，横扫境内虫洞副本。
高丽国唤来鬼修山，驱散所有迷雾禁区。
鹰国召唤毒液，不停吞并四周弱小国度。
华夏因为远古文明断层，神殿图腾缺失严重。
无人唤出强大异兽。
各国嘲笑大夏无能。
随着虫洞副本，不停吞噬境内领土，大夏国运值越来越低，整个国度岌岌可危。
杨凡穿越到此，开局获得超神品兽符《山海经》。
当别人还在为召唤出 B 级异兽沾沾自喜时，杨凡用兽符《山海经》，已经召唤出 SSS 级异兽烛龙！
大夏无强大异兽？
烛龙、刑天、凤凰、穷奇等要不了解下？
盘古、女娲、伏羲等远古神灵，也纷纷登场！
在超神品兽符《山海经》变态召唤下，杨凡率领异兽军团，征战所有虫洞副本，横扫全球！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d36931f0e8f7fdcf61ceb83891bc348b","author":"提酒卖花","author_id":"","book_id":"7368494408586513432","book_name":"开局觉醒山海经，国家让我别装了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7024人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7368495479367156248","read_count":"7024","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1293795"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"625","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,开局,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/14ca0763d76a1d32aa55c7ccf72de100~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779290065&x-signature=NhyVwQJo8PHIh%2BM%2F0TE3V%2BU%2FLh8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2375395172683630","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"42"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321231424E65D9AA3B12E1CCA3C27"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":50,"f
